name: DrawerRoot
description: Bottom-anchored overlay panel using native <dialog>. Ideal for mobile-first interactions.
whenToUse: For mobile-friendly bottom sheets and action panels.
avoidWhen: For side panels - use Sheet. For centered modals - use Dialog.
accessibilityRequirements: ModalLabelProps: aria-label or aria-labelledby required on DrawerContent.

parts.name: DrawerTrigger
parts.description: Button that opens the parent DrawerRoot.

parts.name: DrawerContent
parts.description: The <dialog> content panel of a Drawer.

parts.name: DrawerHandle
parts.description: Visual drag handle indicator for a Drawer.

examples.title: Bottom Drawer
examples.code:
{ const el = e.currentTarget as any; drawerOpen = (el.open ?? drawerOpen); }} onchange={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; drawerOpen = (el.open ?? drawerOpen); }} onclick={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; drawerOpen = (el.open ?? drawerOpen); }} ontoggle={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; drawerOpen = (el.open ?? drawerOpen); }}>

Drawer Panel

This is a dialog-based drawer that slides up from the bottom.
